title: Intricate Uruguayan Epoisses Empanadas
description: A garlicky and light Uruguayan dish featuring Epoisses cheese, these empanadas are a show-off delight, with a delicate fold and low-sodium friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, garlic, and Epoisses cheese.
Add the olive oil, egg, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of Epoisses cheese in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the cheese to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with water and bake for 20 minutes.
Serve the empanadas warm and enjoy.
